title: たったひとつの、目指す場所

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text:
Excuse me, but is this the place for the Zen
meditation lesson?

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
Ah, Grass Wonder. You're most welcome to join
us. Though there's just one thing...

text_block_list.name: Umamusume A
text_block_list.text:
My legs are gonna fall off... I-I can't take take it
anymore.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
People tend to underestimate the muscle cramps
one can get during meditation. I've been
encouraging everyone to start with shorter
sessions, but...

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text:
Hehe, how interesting. In that case, I'd like to try
an unlimited session.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text: I figured you would say that.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
In the darkness, you will confront yourself.
Learning to clear your mind will become an aid
for you when you run.

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text:
(A clear mind, nothingness... A state where all
nefarious elements have left the body...)

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text: Where is this? How did I get to the track?

text_block_list.name: Caster
text_block_list.text:
Maruzensky charges ahead! A "Beast" indeed! Can
anyone catch up? Anyone at all?!

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text:
Hehe, is there no one here to challenge me? I
guess the top is mine, thank you very much. ♪

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text: ...No. Not yet!

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text: (A clear mind is still far out of my reach.)

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text:
(Especially when every inch of me yearns to make
it to the top!)

text_block_list.name: Caster
text_block_list.text:
Grass Wonder! Grass Wonder is closing in! Will it
be enough?!

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
I've never seen such intense concentration, Grass
Wonder. Did you reach a state of nothingness?

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text: ...No. It seems I still need more time.

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text:
However, I believe I managed to reaffirm
something.

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text: My goal. My one destination.

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text:
Hehe. Perhaps this is the effect of Zen
meditation? All distractions have been cleared
from my mind.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
After that, Grass Wonder's commitment to
training continues to grow more intense.
